--CETAS ( not defining columns and all as we directly storing another query results)
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE cetas_table
with (
    LOCATION = 'cetas_external_table',
    DATA_SOURCE = external_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = formatcsv
)
as 
SELECT *
FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK '/samples_External_files/dim_product.csv',
		DATA_SOURCE = 'external_source',
        FORMAT='CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION='2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
) AS data;

--- VIEWS 
create VIEW view_query
as 
SELECT * from 
OPENROWSET (
        BULK 'samples_External_files/dim_date.csv',
		DATA_SOURCE = 'external_source',
        FORMAT='CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION='2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
) as query1

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT formatcsv
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        FIRST_ROW = 2,
        USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = TRUE
    )
);


create external table product
(
    product_sk varchar(4000),
    product_code varchar(4000),
    product_name varchar(4000),
    department varchar(4000),
    category varchar(4000),
    supplier_sk varchar(4000),
    list_price varchar(4000),
    uom varchar(4000)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'samples_External_files/dim_product.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = external_source,
    FILE_FORMAT = formatcsv
   
);


select * from sys.external_data_sources where name = 'external_source'

select * from  dbo.product 

SELECT * FROM sys.exteral_s

    LOCATION = 'https://myaccount.dfs.core.windows.net/mycontainer',
    CREDENTIAL = MyCredential
);


CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL MyManagedIdentityCred
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'; -- SYNAPSE WILL AUTOMATICALLY ACCESS NO NEED FO RSAS OR ACCESS KEY JUST ALLOW STORAGE BLOB DATA CONTIRBNUTOR TO SYNAPSE WORKSPACE ON THAT SOTRAGE ACCOUNT 


-- MASTER KEYFOR SYNAPSE EK DATABASE ME SIRF EK MASTER KEY YEH BASICALLY CREDENTIALS KO EMNCRYPT KRKE STORE KRTIU NA KI PLAIN TEXT (SCOPED CREDENTIAL DATA SOURCE ETC )

-- EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT EXAMPLE AGAR EXTERNAL FILE KE UPAR TABLE BNANA CHAHRE TO ISE BNANA PDEGA KYUKI YEH FILE KE UPAR SCHEMA BNAATA JISSE AS A TABLE READ KR PATA 

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csvheader
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',FIRST_ROW = 2)

-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT TOP 100
    jsonContent
/* --> place the keys that you see in JSON documents in the WITH clause:
       , JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.key1') AS header1
       , JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.key2') AS header2
*/
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tayyabexternal.dfs.core.windows.net/externalsamplefiles/JSON_FILES/LoanByTimeSTamp_2013_20260218085401.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0b'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]

CREATE PROCEDURE sp_load_products
AS
BEGIN

    DECLARE @audit_id       NVARCHAR(64)
    DECLARE @records_read   INT = 0
    DECLARE @inserted       INT = 0
    DECLARE @updated        INT = 0
    DECLARE @rows_affected  INT = 0
    DECLARE @error_msg      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL
    DECLARE @run_date       DATETIME = GETDATE()
    DECLARE @before_count   INT = 0
    DECLARE @after_count    INT = 0

    BEGIN TRY

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 1: stg → master_products
        -- =============================================
        SET @records_read = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stg_products)
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)

        MERGE master_products AS tgt
        USING stg_products AS src
        ON tgt.product_id = src.product_id

        WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
            tgt.title                   = src.title,
            tgt.description             = src.description,
            tgt.category                = src.category,
            tgt.brand                   = src.brand,
            tgt.sku                     = src.sku,
            tgt.price                   = src.price,
            tgt.discount_percentage     = src.discount_percentage,
            tgt.rating                  = src.rating,
            tgt.stock                   = src.stock,
            tgt.availability_status     = src.availability_status,
            tgt.minimum_order_quantity  = src.minimum_order_quantity,
            tgt.weight                  = src.weight,
            tgt.depth                   = src.depth,
            tgt.height                  = src.height,
            tgt.width                   = src.width,
            tgt.warranty_information    = src.warranty_information,
            tgt.shipping_information    = src.shipping_information,
            tgt.return_policy           = src.return_policy,
            tgt.barcode                 = src.barcode,
            tgt.thumbnail               = src.thumbnail,
            tgt.updated_at              = src.updated_at,
            tgt.load_date               = src.load_date,
            tgt.hash_key                = src.hash_key,
            tgt.dw_modified_date        = @run_date

        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            product_id, title, description, category, brand, sku,
            price, discount_percentage, rating, stock, availability_status,
            minimum_order_quantity, weight, depth, height, width,
            warranty_information, shipping_information, return_policy,
            barcode, thumbnail, created_at, updated_at,
            load_date, source_system, hash_key,
            dw_created_date, dw_modified_date
        )
        VALUES (
            src.product_id, src.title, src.description, src.category, src.brand, src.sku,
            src.price, src.discount_percentage, src.rating, src.stock, src.availability_status,
            src.minimum_order_quantity, src.weight, src.depth, src.height, src.width,
            src.warranty_information, src.shipping_information, src.return_policy,
            src.barcode, src.thumbnail, src.created_at, src.updated_at,
            src.load_date, src.source_system, src.hash_key,
            @run_date, @run_date
        );

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @updated       = @records_read - @inserted
        SET @rows_affected = @records_read

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('master_products', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'master_products', @records_read,
            @inserted, @updated, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 2: master → dim_category
        -- =============================================
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_category)

        MERGE dim_category AS tgt
        USING (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                ABS(CHECKSUM(category)) AS category_key,
                category                AS category_name,
                @run_date               AS created_date
            FROM master_products
            WHERE category IS NOT NULL
        ) AS src
        ON tgt.category_key = src.category_key

        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            category_key, category_name, created_date
        )
        VALUES (
            src.category_key, src.category_name, src.created_date
        );

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_category)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('dim_category', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'dim_category', @inserted,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 3: master → dim_brand
        -- =============================================
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_brand)

        MERGE dim_brand AS tgt
        USING (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                ABS(CHECKSUM(brand)) AS brand_key,
                brand                AS brand_name,
                @run_date            AS created_date
            FROM master_products
            WHERE brand IS NOT NULL
        ) AS src
        ON tgt.brand_key = src.brand_key

        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            brand_key, brand_name, created_date
        )
        VALUES (
            src.brand_key, src.brand_name, src.created_date
        );

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_brand)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('dim_brand', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'dim_brand', @inserted,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        -- =============================================
        -- STEP 4: master → fact_product_pricing
        -- =============================================
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)

        INSERT INTO fact_product_pricing (
            fact_id, product_id, category_key, brand_key,
            price, discount_percentage, discounted_price,
            stock, rating, load_date, pipeline_run_date
        )
        SELECT
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.product_id, @run_date)),
            m.product_id,
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.category)),
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.brand)),
            m.price,
            m.discount_percentage,
            ROUND(m.price - (m.price * m.discount_percentage / 100), 2),
            m.stock,
            m.rating,
            m.load_date,
            @run_date
        FROM master_products m

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_product_pricing)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('fact_product_pricing', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'fact_product_pricing', @before_count,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        SET @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()
        SET @audit_id  = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                         CONCAT('ERROR', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'sp_load_products', 0,
            0, 0, 0, @error_msg, @run_date
        )

    END CATCH

END

-- TABLE 1: stg_products

CREATE TABLE stg_products (
    product_id              SMALLINT,
    title                   NVARCHAR(255),
    description             NVARCHAR(1000),
    category                NVARCHAR(100),
    brand                   NVARCHAR(100),
    sku                     NVARCHAR(50),
    price                   FLOAT,
    discount_percentage     FLOAT,
    rating                  FLOAT,
    stock                   SMALLINT,
    availability_status     NVARCHAR(50),
    minimum_order_quantity  SMALLINT,
    weight                  SMALLINT,
    depth                   FLOAT,
    height                  FLOAT,
    width                   FLOAT,
    warranty_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    shipping_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    return_policy           NVARCHAR(100),
    barcode                 NVARCHAR(50),
    thumbnail               NVARCHAR(500),
    created_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    updated_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    load_date               DATE,
    source_system           NVARCHAR(50),
    hash_key                NVARCHAR(64)
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);

-- TABLE 2: master_products

CREATE TABLE master_products (
    product_id              SMALLINT        NOT NULL,
    title                   NVARCHAR(255),
    description             NVARCHAR(1000),
    category                NVARCHAR(100),
    brand                   NVARCHAR(100),
    sku                     NVARCHAR(50),
    price                   FLOAT,
    discount_percentage     FLOAT,
    rating                  FLOAT,
    stock                   SMALLINT,
    availability_status     NVARCHAR(50),
    minimum_order_quantity  SMALLINT,
    weight                  SMALLINT,
    depth                   FLOAT,
    height                  FLOAT,
    width                   FLOAT,
    warranty_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    shipping_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    return_policy           NVARCHAR(100),
    barcode                 NVARCHAR(50),
    thumbnail               NVARCHAR(500),
    created_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    updated_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    load_date               DATE,
    source_system           NVARCHAR(50),
    hash_key                NVARCHAR(64),
    dw_created_date         DATETIME,
    dw_modified_date        DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(product_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);


-- TABLE 3 dim_category

CREATE TABLE dim_category (
    category_key        INT             NOT NULL,
    category_name       NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    created_date        DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);


-- TABLE 4: dim_brand

CREATE TABLE dim_brand (
    brand_key           INT             NOT NULL,
    brand_name          NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    created_date        DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);


-- TABLE 5: fact_product_pricing

CREATE TABLE fact_product_pricing (
    fact_id             INT             NOT NULL,
    product_id          SMALLINT        NOT NULL,
    category_key        INT,
    brand_key           INT,
    price               FLOAT,
    discount_percentage FLOAT,
    discounted_price    FLOAT,
    stock               SMALLINT,
    rating              FLOAT,
    load_date           DATE,
    pipeline_run_date   DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(product_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

-- TABLE 6: audit_log

CREATE TABLE audit_log (
    audit_id            NVARCHAR(64)    NOT NULL,
    table_name          NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    records_read        INT,
    records_inserted    INT,
    records_updated     INT,
    rows_affected       INT,
    error_message       NVARCHAR(500),
    load_timestamp      DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);

CREATE PROCEDURE sp_load_products
AS
BEGIN

    DECLARE @audit_id       NVARCHAR(64)
    DECLARE @records_read   INT = 0
    DECLARE @inserted       INT = 0
    DECLARE @updated        INT = 0
    DECLARE @rows_affected  INT = 0
    DECLARE @error_msg      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL
    DECLARE @run_date       DATETIME = GETDATE()
    DECLARE @before_count   INT = 0
    DECLARE @after_count    INT = 0

    BEGIN TRY

        SET @records_read = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stg_products)
        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)

        MERGE master_products AS tgt
        USING stg_products AS src
        ON tgt.product_id = src.product_id

        WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
            tgt.title                   = src.title,
            tgt.description             = src.description,
            tgt.category                = src.category,
            tgt.brand                   = src.brand,
            tgt.sku                     = src.sku,
            tgt.price                   = src.price,
            tgt.discount_percentage     = src.discount_percentage,
            tgt.rating                  = src.rating,
            tgt.stock                   = src.stock,
            tgt.availability_status     = src.availability_status,
            tgt.minimum_order_quantity  = src.minimum_order_quantity,
            tgt.weight                  = src.weight,
            tgt.depth                   = src.depth,
            tgt.height                  = src.height,
            tgt.width                   = src.width,
            tgt.warranty_information    = src.warranty_information,
            tgt.shipping_information    = src.shipping_information,
            tgt.return_policy           = src.return_policy,
            tgt.barcode                 = src.barcode,
            tgt.thumbnail               = src.thumbnail,
            tgt.updated_at              = src.updated_at,
            tgt.load_date               = src.load_date,
            tgt.hash_key                = src.hash_key,
            tgt.dw_modified_date        = @run_date

        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            product_id, title, description, category, brand, sku,
            price, discount_percentage, rating, stock, availability_status,
            minimum_order_quantity, weight, depth, height, width,
            warranty_information, shipping_information, return_policy,
            barcode, thumbnail, created_at, updated_at,
            load_date, source_system, hash_key,
            dw_created_date, dw_modified_date
        )
        VALUES (
            src.product_id, src.title, src.description, src.category, src.brand, src.sku,
            src.price, src.discount_percentage, src.rating, src.stock, src.availability_status,
            src.minimum_order_quantity, src.weight, src.depth, src.height, src.width,
            src.warranty_information, src.shipping_information, src.return_policy,
            src.barcode, src.thumbnail, src.created_at, src.updated_at,
            src.load_date, src.source_system, src.hash_key,
            @run_date, @run_date
        );

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master_products)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @updated       = @records_read - @inserted
        SET @rows_affected = @records_read

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('master_products', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'master_products', @records_read,
            @inserted, @updated, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_category)

        INSERT INTO dim_category (category_key, category_name, created_date)
        SELECT DISTINCT
            ABS(CHECKSUM(category)),
            category,
            @run_date
        FROM master_products
        WHERE category IS NOT NULL
        AND ABS(CHECKSUM(category)) NOT IN (SELECT category_key FROM dim_category)

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_category)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('dim_category', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'dim_category', @inserted,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_brand)

        INSERT INTO dim_brand (brand_key, brand_name, created_date)
        SELECT DISTINCT
            ABS(CHECKSUM(brand)),
            brand,
            @run_date
        FROM master_products
        WHERE brand IS NOT NULL
        AND ABS(CHECKSUM(brand)) NOT IN (SELECT brand_key FROM dim_brand)

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dim_brand)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('dim_brand', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'dim_brand', @inserted,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

        SET @before_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_product_pricing)

        INSERT INTO fact_product_pricing (
            fact_id, product_id, category_key, brand_key,
            price, discount_percentage, discounted_price,
            stock, rating, load_date, pipeline_run_date
        )
        SELECT
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.product_id, @run_date)),
            m.product_id,
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.category)),
            ABS(CHECKSUM(m.brand)),
            m.price,
            m.discount_percentage,
            ROUND(m.price - (m.price * m.discount_percentage / 100), 2),
            m.stock,
            m.rating,
            m.load_date,
            @run_date
        FROM master_products m

        SET @after_count   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_product_pricing)
        SET @inserted      = @after_count - @before_count
        SET @rows_affected = @inserted

        SET @audit_id = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                        CONCAT('fact_product_pricing', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'fact_product_pricing', @before_count,
            @inserted, 0, @rows_affected, NULL, @run_date
        )

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        SET @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()
        SET @audit_id  = CONVERT(NVARCHAR(64), HASHBYTES('SHA2_256',
                         CONCAT('ERROR', CONVERT(NVARCHAR(50), @run_date))), 2)

        INSERT INTO audit_log (
            audit_id, table_name, records_read,
            records_inserted, records_updated,
            rows_affected, error_message, load_timestamp
        )
        VALUES (
            @audit_id, 'sp_load_products', 0,
            0, 0, 0, @error_msg, @run_date
        )

    END CATCH

END

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE extsource
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://tayyabexternal.blob.core.windows.net/externalsamplefiles',
    CREDENTIAL = extcreds
);

create DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL extcreds
with IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csvext
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',FIRST_ROW = 2)
);

-- JO 1. 2 NO DERHAHA HU vo order hai kis order me column chahiye
COPY INTO dbo.copy_into
(
    customer_sk,
    customer_code,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    gender,
    email,
    phone,
    loyalty_tier,
    signup_date
)
FROM 'https://tayyabexternal.blob.core.windows.net/externalsamplefiles/CSV_FILE/dim_customer.csv'
WITH (
    FILE_TYPE = 'CSV',
    FIRSTROW = 2,
    FIELDTERMINATOR = ',',
    CREDENTIAL = (IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity')
);

CREATE VIEW viewex
AS (
SELECT * FROM copy_into
)


--crerating external table in dedidcatedsqlpool


CREATE EXTERNAL table exttable
(
    customer_sk varchar(4000),
    customer_code varchar(4000),
    first_name varchar(4000),
    last_name varchar(4000),
    gender varchar(4000),
    email varchar(4000),
    phone varchar(4000),
    loyalty_tier varchar(4000),
    signup_date varchar(4000)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = '/dim_customer.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = abfsspath,
    FILE_FORMAT = csvext
)

create table polybase_table
with (
        DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN

# Cell 1
import requests
import json
import hashlib
import struct
import pyodbc
import pandas as pd
from datetime import date
from pyspark.sql.types import (
    StructType, StructField, StringType,
    DoubleType, ShortType, DateType
)
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

# Cell 2
def fetch_all_products():
    url = "https://dummyjson.com/products"
    limit = 30
    skip = 0
    all_products = []

    while True:
        resp = requests.get(f"{url}?limit={limit}&skip={skip}")
        resp.raise_for_status()
        data = resp.json()
        products = data.get("products", [])
        if not products:
            break
        all_products.extend(products)
        skip += limit
        if skip >= data.get("total", 0):
            break

    return all_products

raw_products = fetch_all_products()

today = str(date.today())
bronze_path = f"abfss://todaystask@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/products/{today}/products_raw.json"

mssparkutils.fs.put(bronze_path, json.dumps(raw_products, indent=2), overwrite=True)

raw_json = spark.read.text(bronze_path).collect()
raw_json = "".join([row.value for row in raw_json])
raw_products = json.loads(raw_json)

from pyspark.sql import Row
from datetime import date

def flatten_product(p):
    dim = p.get("dimensions", {})
    meta = p.get("meta", {})
    hash_key = hashlib.sha256(json.dumps({
        "product_id": p.get("id"),
        "price": p.get("price"),
        "stock": p.get("stock"),
        "discount_percentage": p.get("discountPercentage")
    }, sort_keys=True).encode()).hexdigest()

    return Row(
        product_id             = int(p.get("id", 0)),
        title                  = str(p.get("title", "") or ""),
        description            = str(p.get("description", "") or "")[:1000],
        category               = str(p.get("category", "") or ""),
        brand                  = str(p.get("brand", "") or ""),
        sku                    = str(p.get("sku", "") or ""),
        price                  = float(p.get("price", 0.0) or 0.0),
        discount_percentage    = float(p.get("discountPercentage", 0.0) or 0.0),
        rating                 = float(p.get("rating", 0.0) or 0.0),
        stock                  = int(p.get("stock", 0) or 0),
        availability_status    = str(p.get("availabilityStatus", "") or ""),
        minimum_order_quantity = int(p.get("minimumOrderQuantity", 1) or 1),
        weight                 = int(p.get("weight", 0) or 0),
        depth                  = float(dim.get("depth", 0.0) or 0.0),
        height                 = float(dim.get("height", 0.0) or 0.0),
        width                  = float(dim.get("width", 0.0) or 0.0),
        warranty_information   = str(p.get("warrantyInformation", "") or ""),
        shipping_information   = str(p.get("shippingInformation", "") or ""),
        return_policy          = str(p.get("returnPolicy", "") or ""),
        barcode                = str(meta.get("barcode", "") or ""),
        thumbnail              = str(p.get("thumbnail", "") or "")[:500],
        created_at             = str(meta.get("createdAt", "") or ""),
        updated_at             = str(meta.get("updatedAt", "") or ""),
        load_date              = date.today(),
        source_system          = "dummyjson",
        hash_key               = hash_key
    )

rows = [flatten_product(p) for p in raw_products]

# Cell 5
schema = StructType([
    StructField("product_id",              ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("title",                   StringType(), True),
    StructField("description",             StringType(), True),
    StructField("category",                StringType(), True),
    StructField("brand",                   StringType(), True),
    StructField("sku",                     StringType(), True),
    StructField("price",                   DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("discount_percentage",     DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("rating",                  DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("stock",                   ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("availability_status",     StringType(), True),
    StructField("minimum_order_quantity",  ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("weight",                  ShortType(),  True),
    StructField("depth",                   DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("height",                  DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("width",                   DoubleType(), True),
    StructField("warranty_information",    StringType(), True),
    StructField("shipping_information",    StringType(), True),
    StructField("return_policy",           StringType(), True),
    StructField("barcode",                 StringType(), True),
    StructField("thumbnail",               StringType(), True),
    StructField("created_at",              StringType(), True),
    StructField("updated_at",              StringType(), True),
    StructField("load_date",               DateType(),   True),
    StructField("source_system",           StringType(), True),
    StructField("hash_key",                StringType(), True),
])

df = spark.createDataFrame(rows, schema=schema)

import struct
import pyodbc
import pandas as pd

token = mssparkutils.credentials.getToken("DW")
token_bytes = token.encode("UTF-8")
exptoken = b"".join([bytes([b, 0]) for b in token_bytes])
tokenstruct = struct.pack("=i", len(exptoken)) + exptoken

conn = pyodbc.connect(
    "Driver={ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server};"
    "Server=tayyabspace.sql.azuresynapse.net,1433;"
    "Database=Tayyabdedicatedpool;"
    "Encrypt=yes;"
    "TrustServerCertificate=no;",
    attrs_before={1256: tokenstruct},
    autocommit=True
)

cursor = conn.cursor()
cursor.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE stg_products")

pandas_df = df.toPandas()
cols = ", ".join(pandas_df.columns)
placeholders = ", ".join(["?" for _ in pandas_df.columns])
insert_sql = f"INSERT INTO stg_products ({cols}) VALUES ({placeholders})"

cursor.fast_executemany = True
cursor.executemany(insert_sql, pandas_df.values.tolist())

cursor.close()
conn.close()

from pyspark.sql.functions import *

# ── 1. CONFIG
raw_path    = "abfss://ecommerce@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/"
silver_path = "abfss://ecommerce@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/"


if not file_name:
    raise ValueError("No file_name parameter received!")

# ── 3. READ
df_raw = spark.read \
    .format("csv") \
    .option("header", "true") \
    .option("inferSchema", "true") \
    .load(raw_path + file_name)

# ── 4. SELECT columns
df = df_raw.select(
    "user_id", "product_id", "category", "subcategory","brand", "price", "discount", "final_price",
    "rating", "review_count", "stock", "seller_id", "seller_rating","purchase_date", "shipping_time_days",
    "location", "device", "payment_method","is_returned", "delivery_status" )
    
# ── 5. TRANSFORM
df_clean = df \
    .withColumn("purchase_date",   to_date(col("purchase_date"))) \
    .withColumn("category",        trim(col("category"))) \
    .withColumn("delivery_status", trim(col("delivery_status"))) \
    .withColumn("ingested_at",     current_timestamp()) \
    .dropna(subset=["user_id", "product_id", "purchase_date"])

# print(f"Rows after cleaning: {df_clean.count()}")

# ── 6. WRITE Delta to Silver
df_clean.write \
    .format("delta") \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .option("mergeSchema", "true") \
    .save(silver_path)

from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import json

staging_path = "abfss://ecommerce@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/staging/"
bronze_path   = "abfss://ecommerce@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/"
silver_path   = "abfss://ecommerce@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/scheduled_silver/"
metadata_path = "abfss://ecommerce@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/metadata_scheduled/processed_files.json"

# ── 1 Pehle se process hui files ki list lo
try:
    content = mssparkutils.fs.head(metadata_path) #vyeh json k andar ka text dega in string
    processed_files = json.loads(content) # make it as python object (list)
except:
    processed_files = []

print(f" processed files: {processed_files}")

#  2 Staging all csv files
all_files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(staging_path)

# Sirf woh files lo jo pehle process nahi hui
new_files = [f for f in all_files if f.name.endswith(".csv") and f.name not in processed_files]

print(f"New files: {[f.name for f in new_files]}")

if not new_files:
    print("no new files.")

else:
    #  4 Nai files Bronze mein copy karo as-is backup
    for f in new_files:
        mssparkutils.fs.cp(f.path, bronze_path + f.name)
    print(f"Bronze mein copy ho gayi: {[f.name for f in new_files]}")

    #  5 Sirf nai files read karo
    df_raw = spark.read \
        .format("csv") \
        .option("header", "true") \
        .option("inferSchema", "true") \
        .load([f.path for f in new_files])

    #  6. Columns select karo
    df = df_raw.select(
        "user_id", "product_id", "category", "subcategory","brand", "price", "discount",
         "final_price", "rating", "review_count", "stock","seller_id", "seller_rating",
        "purchase_date", "shipping_time_days", "location", "device", "payment_method", "is_returned", "delivery_status"
    )

    #  7. Transform
    df_clean = df \
        .withColumn("purchase_date",   to_date(col("purchase_date"))) \
        .withColumn("category",        trim(col("category"))) \
        .withColumn("delivery_status", trim(col("delivery_status"))) \
        .withColumn("ingested_at",     current_timestamp()) \
        .dropna(subset=["user_id", "product_id", "purchase_date"])

    #  8. Silver writing the table
    # 1st  overwrite new table create
    # 2nd  MERGE no duplicates
    if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, silver_path):
        DeltaTable.forPath(spark, silver_path).alias("existing") \
            .merge(
                df_clean.alias("new"),
                """existing.user_id = new.user_id
                   AND existing.product_id = new.product_id
                   AND existing.purchase_date = new.purchase_date"""
            ) \
            .whenNotMatched().insertAll() \
            .execute()
    else:
        df_clean.write \
            .format("delta") \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .save(silver_path)

    # 9 Metadata update 
    updated_list = processed_files + [f.name for f in new_files]
    mssparkutils.fs.put(metadata_path, json.dumps(updated_list), overwrite=True)

from datetime import datetime
import pyodbc

# run_id banao
run_id = f"RUN_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}"
print(f"Run ID: {run_id}")

# Connection details
server = "tayyabserver.database.windows.net"
database = "StudentMentalHealthDB"
username = "tayyab"
password = "MUMMA9764@#"

# JDBC URL for Spark (baad mein kaam aayega)
jdbc_url = f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;database={database};encrypt=true;trustServerCertificate=false;"
connection_properties = {
    "user": username,
    "password": password,
    "driver": "com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver"
}

# pyodbc se connect karo INSERT ke liye
conn = pyodbc.connect(
    f"DRIVER={{ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server}};"
    f"SERVER={server};"
    f"DATABASE={database};"
    f"UID={username};"
    f"PWD={password};"
    f"Encrypt=yes;TrustServerCertificate=no;"
)
cursor = conn.cursor()

# Audit START insert
cursor.execute("""
    INSERT INTO dbo.audit_pipeline_log 
        (pipeline_name, run_id, start_time, status)
    VALUES 
        ('student_mental_health_notebook', ?, GETDATE(), 'RUNNING')
""", run_id)

conn.commit()
print(f"✅ Audit START inserted — Run ID: {run_id}")

# Bronze se CSV padho
bronze_path = "abfss://studentcare@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/student_lifestyle_100k.csv"

df_raw = spark.read.csv(
    bronze_path,
    header=True,
    inferSchema=True
)

print(f"✅ CSV loaded — Total Rows: {df_raw.count()}")
print(f"Columns: {df_raw.columns}")
df_raw.show(5)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import FloatType

# Step 1 — Nulls drop karo
df_clean = df_raw.dropna()

# Step 2 — Column names standardize karo (lowercase + underscore)
df_clean = df_clean.toDF(*[c.lower().replace(" ", "_") for c in df_clean.columns])

# Step 3 — Depression column — True/False → 1/0
df_clean = df_clean.withColumn(
    "depression",
    F.when(F.col("depression") == True, 1).otherwise(0).cast("int")
)

# Step 4 — Risk Score calculate karo
# Logic:
# stress_level     → 0-10 scale already hai
# cgpa             → low cgpa = high risk (10 - cgpa) normalize
# sleep_duration   → kam sleep = high risk
# social_media     → zyada social media = high risk

df_clean = df_clean.withColumn(
    "risk_score",
    F.round(
        (F.col("stress_level") * 0.4) +
        ((10 - F.col("cgpa")) * 0.3) +
        ((8 - F.col("sleep_duration")) * 0.2) +
        (F.col("social_media_hours") * 0.1),
        2
    )
)

# Step 5 — Risk Category
df_clean = df_clean.withColumn(
    "risk_category",
    F.when(F.col("risk_score") >= 7, "HIGH")
     .when(F.col("risk_score") >= 4, "MEDIUM")
     .otherwise("LOW")
)

print(f"✅ Clean rows: {df_clean.count()}")
print(f"Risk Distribution:")
df_clean.groupBy("risk_category").count().show()
df_clean.show(5)

# Silver path
silver_path = "abfss://studentcare@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/clean/"

# Parquet write karo
df_clean.write \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .parquet(silver_path)

print(f"✅ Silver Parquet written — Path: {silver_path}")

# Verify karo
mssparkutils.fs.ls(silver_path)

# Step 1 — Staging table pehle clear karo
cursor.execute("TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.stg_mental_health")
conn.commit()
print("✅ Staging cleared")

# Step 2 — Silver se parquet padho (confirm ke liye)
df_silver = spark.read.parquet(silver_path)

# Step 3 — Staging mein load karo JDBC se
df_silver.select(
    "student_id",
    "age",
    "gender",
    "department",
    "cgpa",
    "sleep_duration",
    "study_hours",
    "social_media_hours",
    "physical_activity",
    "stress_level",
    "depression",
    "risk_category",
    "risk_score"
).write \
 .format("jdbc") \
 .option("url", jdbc_url) \
 .option("dbtable", "dbo.stg_mental_health") \
 .option("user", username) \
 .option("password", password) \
 .option("driver", "com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver") \
 .mode("append") \
 .save()

print(f"✅ Staging loaded")

# Step 4 — SP call karo
cursor.execute("EXEC dbo.usp_load_mental_health ?", run_id)
conn.commit()
print(f"✅ SP executed — run_id: {run_id}")

import datetime

# Step 1 — Bronze file Archive mein copy karo
source_path = "abfss://studentcare@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/student_lifestyle_100k.csv"
archive_path = f"abfss://studentcare@tayyabadls.dfs.core.windows.net/archive/student_lifestyle_100k_{run_id}.csv"

mssparkutils.fs.mv(source_path, archive_path)
print(f"✅ File archived — {archive_path}")

# Step 2 — Audit END update karo
cursor.execute("""
    UPDATE dbo.audit_pipeline_log
    SET end_time = GETDATE(),
        status = 'SUCCESS',
        rows_processed = ?
    WHERE run_id = ?
""", df_silver.count(), run_id)

conn.commit()
print(f"✅ Audit END updated — Status: SUCCESS")

# Step 3 — Connection close karo
cursor.close()
conn.close()
print("✅ Connection closed")

print(f"\n🎉 Pipeline Complete — Run ID: {run_id}")
